titleStmt.title: SII 29.28: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 28. (A.R. No. B. 540 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the field of Saranappa.

It carries an eulogy of Śrī-Chāmaladēvi, the queen of Chālukya Traiḷōkamalladēva and daughter of Bamma. It states that when the queen was camping at Saṟimale for a holy-bath in the confluence of the rivers Tuṅgabhadrā and Kṛishṇavēṇi, Bhāskara-Seṭṭi made a land grant in Bhattagrāma-Baḷḷaniṭṭage situated in Mosaḷikal-300, a kaṁpaṇa of Eḍadoṟe-2000. The measuring rod Hiriyakōl is mentioned here.
It is dated Śaka 980, Viḷambi, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Sunday Akshaya-tritiya. It corresponds to 1058 A.D., March 30, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācandrārka tāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire svastyanavarata paramakalyāṇābhyu
daya sahasraphaḷa bhōgabhāgini kaḷahaṁsagāmi
ni gōtra pavitra vimaḷa caritrepātra cūḍāmaṇi su
jana rakṣāmaṇi citra vidyādhari sakaḷa kaḷādhari male
[ya ?] beṭiṁge barmmanaṇuṁgiyāśritajana kāmadhēnu
kaliyuga sīte patihitagirijāte śrīmattrai
ḷōkyamalladēva viśāḷa vakṣasthaḷa nivāsiniyarappa
śrīmaccāmaladēviyarssaṟimaleya nelevīḍi
noḷ sakavarṣa 980 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada vai
śākha suddha 3 Ādityavāravaduveyakṣaya
(kṣaya) parvva sammandhiyiṁ tuṁgabhadreya kṛṣṇa
(vē)ṇnānadī saṁgamada tīrtthasnāna nimitta veḍedoṟedoṟē
yircchāsirada kaṁpaṇa mesaḷikalmūnūṟa
ṟoḷagaṇa bhattagrāma baḷḷaniṭṭageyoḷ
śivapāda paṁkaja bhramaraṁ bhāskaraseṭṭiyaru
kiṟege kaṁcatāḷa baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga Ākeṟe
yiṁ paḍuvalalliya gaḍiṁbaḍi hiriyakōlōḷ
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvabādhā parihāramāgi biṭṭa
kariyanelaṁ mattarppattu . Ī dharmma manācandrā
rkka tāraṁ pratipāḷisuvudida naḷidavaṁge pra
yāgeya taḍiyoḷgā brāhmaṇa vadhegeyda dā
daṁ sārgu . kanda . manetoḷavaṟekeyatīrtamā
nētraṁ mindalli gō sahasraṁ goṭṭatana puṇya me
redāṁgananta mabhyudaya makkamāyadra yu
ka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēta vasundha
rāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyate kri
miḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷe
kāḷe pāḷaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvina pā
rtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 29.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
